NeuralQuant Platform
nodes.summary: AI-powered stock intelligence platform combining 5-factor quant signal engine with 7-agent PARA-DEBATE system for US and India (NSE) equity markets. 100% live data, v3.0.0.

nodes.label: PARA-DEBATE Protocol
nodes.summary: 7-agent AI debate system: MACRO, FUNDAMENTAL, TECHNICAL, SENTIMENT, GEOPOLITICAL, ADVERSARIAL agents run in parallel via asyncio.gather; HEAD ANALYST synthesises into structured verdict (BUY/HOLD/SELL).

nodes.label: 5-Factor Quant Model
nodes.summary: Cross-sectional factor model: Quality (25%), Momentum (30%), Value (10%), Low-Volatility (15%), Short Interest (15%). Regime weights shift based on 4-state HMM. Rank-normalised 1-10 scoring.

nodes.label: Adversarial Agent Design
nodes.summary: Core architectural insight: permanent bear/devil's advocate agent that steelmans the bear case on every analysis, preventing herding. Absent from all competitors.

nodes.label: Self-Aware NL Query Engine
nodes.summary: NL query endpoint auto-detects if question needs platform's own screener data and injects live scores, factor percentiles, FRED macro, and news headlines before each LLM call. Multi-turn conversation with history.

nodes.label: NSE India Market Coverage
nodes.summary: 50 NSE stocks scored with full 5-factor model, regime detection, PARA-DEBATE. India's 90M+ Demat account market underserved by Western tools. NSE Bhavcopy connector for EOD data.

nodes.label: 100% Live Data Pipeline
nodes.summary: Zero synthetic data policy. 19 live data sources: FRED (HY spreads, CPI, Fed funds, 2Y/10Y yields), yfinance (OHLCV, fundamentals, news), EDGAR Form 4 insider trades. 4-hour fundamental cache, 1-hour macro cache, ThreadPoolExecutor 12 workers.

nodes.label: 4-State HMM Regime Detector
nodes.summary: Hidden Markov Model with 4 states: Risk-On, Late-Cycle, Bear, Recovery. Regime shifts adjust factor weights automatically. Validated across 8 out-of-sample quarters.

nodes.label: LightGBM LambdaRank
nodes.summary: Learning-to-rank signal combiner with NDCG objective. Walk-forward backtesting with rolling IC, ICIR, and hit-rate validation across regimes.

nodes.label: Backtest Results (2021Q4â€“2025Q4)
nodes.summary: Walk-forward backtest over 16 quarters, 16,966 rows. IC Mean: -0.0225, IC Std: 0.0680, ICIR: -0.3315, Hit Rate: 25.0%, OOS quarters: 8. Features: quality, momentum, value, low_vol, holding percentiles.

nodes.label: SaaS Monetisation Strategy
nodes.summary: Freemium SaaS model. Revenue streams: subscriptions, API overage ($0.01/call), NSE data licensing to Indian brokerages, white-label, brokerage affiliates. Target $1M ARR at Month 24 at 85% gross margin. LTV:CAC ratio ~25x.

nodes.label: Competitive Positioning
nodes.summary: Positioned against Bloomberg ($2k+/mo), Danelfin (opaque scores), Perplexity Finance (no quant backend), FactSet Mercury ($15k/yr), SimplyWall.St (US-heavy). Key diff: affordable + explainable + AI-debated conviction + India coverage.

nodes.label: Target Markets
nodes.summary: Four segments: retail investors (affordable 5-factor scoring), RIAs (documentable PARA-DEBATE output for client reports), quant researchers (raw factor JSON API), Indian investors (NSE coverage unmatched at retail price).

nodes.label: Go-To-Market Strategy
nodes.summary: Phase 1: seed r/IndiaInvestments, r/quantfinance, Indian Telegram groups via free tier + NeuralQuant Weekly reports. Phase 2: gate PARA-DEBATE behind paid tier. Phase 3: enterprise/API to Indian brokerages (Zerodha, Groww, Angel One).

nodes.label: Technology Moat
nodes.summary: Five overlapping defensibilities: 1) PARA-DEBATE architecture (hard to replicate), 2) self-aware query loop (unique), 3) live India data pipeline, 4) cross-sectional rank scoring (meaningful spread), 5) full explainability layer.

nodes.label: Phase 4 Roadmap
nodes.summary: Planned features: Supabase user auth, watchlist/portfolio construction, WebSocket real-time score streaming, email/push alerts on score changes, sector-adjusted quality scoring (ROE/NIM for financials), EDGAR Form 4 wired to scoring, India NSE Bhavcopy real-time.

nodes.label: AskAI Improvements Plan
nodes.summary: 5 user-reported issues fixed: out-of-universe stocks (NSE dynamic lookup via WORD.NS), homepage query box memory (full chat with history), cold-start loading UX, India query polluted by US macro, indirect/non-actionable AI responses. NSE name map for natural language (TRENT, ZOMATO, HDFC, etc).

nodes.label: Deployment Architecture
nodes.summary: Frontend on Vercel, API on Railway/Render free tier. QA authenticity testing: FRED cross-checks (within 5% tolerance), stock fundamentals fresher than 4h, query engine cites own screener, PARA-DEBATE structured verdict for any valid ticker.

nodes.label: Phase 1 Foundation Plan
nodes.summary: Turborepo monorepo. packages/data (DataBroker with rate-limiting token buckets, DuckDB store, yfinance+NSE connectors, FRED, EDGAR) and packages/signals (10-factor library, LightGBM LambdaRank, 4-state HMM). V8 scoring logic ported from prior project.

nodes.label: Phase 2 AI Platform Plan
nodes.summary: FastAPI backend wrapping Phase 1 signals + 7-agent PARA-DEBATE via asyncio. Next.js 15 frontend with Google Stitch components, shadcn/ui, Recharts. Supabase auth, Vercel frontend, Railway API.

nodes.label: NeuralQuant Business Report v3.0
nodes.summary: Business and competitive intelligence report. Core thesis: gap in market is affordable, explainable, AI-debated conviction. Bloomberg has data but costs $2k+/mo; NeuralQuant delivers 80-90% of actionable insight at 1-50% the cost.

nodes.label: NeuralQuant Full System Design Spec
nodes.summary: 5-layer architecture: Data Pipeline, Signal Engine, 7-Agent PARA-DEBATE, Validation Engine (backtest + paper trading + Brier-score calibration), Product layer. Planned FinBERT NLP, Celery+Redis async jobs, Supabase PostgreSQL, TimescaleDB for production analytics.

nodes.label: QA and Deployment Design Spec
nodes.summary: Three-part plan: deep QA of all endpoints, competitive comparison vs Perplexity Finance on 5 identical questions (macro env, top picks, tariffs, NVDA outlook, India market), public deployment on Vercel + Render. Pass criteria: macro values within 5% of FRED reference.

nodes.label: Next.js Public SVG Assets
nodes.summary: Standard Next.js bootstrapped SVG icons: file.svg, globe.svg, next.svg, vercel.svg, window.svg in apps/web/public/. Default create-next-app assets, not custom UI.

nodes.label: Obsidian Knowledge Graph Vault
nodes.summary: Empty Obsidian vault at knowledgeGraph_NeuralQuant/Welcome.md. Placeholder for future structured knowledge management.

nodes.label: FRED Macro Integration
nodes.summary: FRED API series: BAMLH0A0HYM2 (HY spread), CPIAUCSL (CPI YoY), FEDFUNDS (Fed rate), DGS10 (10Y yield), DGS2 (2Y yield). Injected into every PARA-DEBATE agent and NL query for macro context.

nodes.label: Rank-Normalised 1-10 Scoring
nodes.summary: Score compression fix: cross-sectional percentile rank within 50-stock universe guarantees meaningful 1-10 spread. No hardcoded thresholds. Scores spread across 1-10 via rank-based percentile mapping rather than raw composite.
